original_text:
### Brand Accent Shape (core container device)
- A rectangle with **selectively enlarged opposite corner radii**; the other two corners keep a slight radius. Used to house callout text and photography. Reads modern and optimistic.
- Approved radius pairs (print): **1.25" & 0.0625"** (large containers/photos), **0.5" & 0.0625"** (banners), **0.4375" & 0.0625"** (small callout boxes).
- **[GENERAL] Email px conversions (at 96dpi):** large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px. Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair. Be consistent within an email: same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right).
- **Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners** (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]

relations.note: Charts and tables are explicitly excluded from the asymmetric accent-shape treatment.
The uniform-corner exception wins where a chart or table would otherwise receive an email accent-shape treatment.

quotes: Approved radius pairs (print): **1.25" & 0.0625"** (large containers/photos), **0.5" & 0.0625"** (banners), **0.4375" & 0.0625"** (small callout boxes).
A rectangle with **selectively enlarged opposite corner radii**; the other two corners keep a slight radius. Used to house callout text and photography.
Approved radius pairs (print): **1.25" & 0.0625"** (large containers/photos), **0.5" & 0.0625"** (banners), **0.4375" & 0.0625"** (small callout boxes).

rules.intent: Maintain the distinctive modern, optimistic asymmetric container device.
rules.rule_text: Use the Brand Accent Shape for callout-text and photography containers: selectively enlarge opposite corner radii while keeping the other two corners slight. In print, use the approved radius pair for the applicable large container/photo (1.25in and 0.0625in), banner, or small callout-box treatment.

quotes: **[GENERAL] Email px conversions (at 96dpi):** large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px.

**[GENERAL] Email px conversions (at 96dpi):** large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px. Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair. Be consistent within an email: same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right).

rules.intent: Preserve consistent asymmetric shape geometry throughout an email.
rules.rule_text: For email accent shapes, use the specified 96dpi large, banner, and callout radius conversions (for example, 120px and 6px for large shapes). Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair and the slight radius to the other; retain one diagonal orientation across all sections in an email, defaulting to large radii at top-left and bottom-right.

quotes: Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners
Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners** (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]

rules.intent: Keep data containers visually neutral and consistently legible.
rules.rule_text: Charts and tables are an exception to the asymmetric Brand Accent Shape: use uniform rounded corners on all four corners at the general 12px radius, not the asymmetric accent shape.

- **[GENERAL] Email px conversions (at 96dpi):** large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px. Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair. Be consistent within an email: same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right).
- **Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners** (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]

rules.intent: Bind the Brand Accent Shape (core container device) table values verbatim.
rules.rule_text:
The Brand Accent Shape (core container device) table is a closed, brand-approved set; every row binds its listed values exactly as specified. Do not invent or alter rows.

| item | value |
|---|---|
| Approved radius pairs (print) | **1.25" & 0.0625"** (large containers/photos), **0.5" & 0.0625"** (banners), **0.4375" & 0.0625"** (small callout boxes). |
| [GENERAL] Email px conversions (at 96dpi) | ** large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px. Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair. Be consistent within an email: same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right). |
| Exception | charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners** (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.] |
